/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX15.5.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/ChipletNetworkSim.dir/src/buffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ChipletNetworkSim.dir/src/chip.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ChipletNetworkSim.dir/src/config.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ChipletNetworkSim.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ChipletNetworkSim.dir/src/node.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ChipletNetworkSim.dir/src/packet.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ChipletNetworkSim.dir/src/system.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ChipletNetworkSim.dir/src/traffic_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ChipletNetworkSim.dir/src/netrace/netrace.c.o CMakeFiles/ChipletNetworkSim.dir/src/topologies/chip_mesh.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ChipletNetworkSim.dir/src/topologies/dragonfly_chiplet.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ChipletNetworkSim.dir/src/topologies/dragonfly_sw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ChipletNetworkSim.dir/src/topologies/multiple_chip_mesh.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ChipletNetworkSim.dir/src/topologies/multiple_chip_torus.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ChipletNetworkSim.dir/src/topologies/single_chip_mesh.cpp.o -o ChipletNetworkSim
